Professional Summary

DevOps Engineer II / Platform Engineer building OCI, Kubernetes (OKE), Terraform, and MLOps-ready production platforms where architecture, delivery, and reliability have to work together. Strong focus on Infrastructure as Code, secure networking, CI/CD, observability, production operations, release management, cost optimization, and AI/MLOps foundations. Target roles include Platform Engineer, DevOps Engineer, OCI Cloud Engineer, and Kubernetes / MLOps Platform Engineer.

Experience

DevOps Engineer II / Platform Engineer, Oracle

2023--Present

Casablanca, Morocco

  • Own OCI-native platform architecture across development, test, stage, and production environments.
  • Refactored and migrated Terraform infrastructure while protecting 500+ OCI resources per environment from unnecessary recreation.
  • Designed secure networking paths across load balancers, API gateways, reverse proxies, Kubernetes services, application platforms, and third-party authN/authZ flows.
  • Deployed and operated Kubernetes clusters on OKE, improving scalability, resilience, and high availability for containerized workloads.
  • Managed release lifecycle from development to production, including deployment validation, rollback planning, and post-release monitoring.
  • Improved incident detection and triage using OCI Logging, OCI Monitoring, Grafana dashboards, alarms, and operational runbooks.
  • Improved platform scalability, performance, and cost efficiency through architecture, configuration, and resource optimization.
  • Automated provisioning, orchestration, deployment, scaling, and management of containerized workloads.
  • Supported Beta programs, technical workshops, and POCs while contributing to delivery of the team’s first GA product.
  • Owned production operations, troubleshooting platform issues, and improving reliability across environments.
  • Mentored team members and supported onboarding, knowledge sharing, troubleshooting, and platform adoption by other teams.
  • Enabled AI-ready data foundations using OCI Data Science, MLflow, Object Storage, Data Flow, Spark, and model artifact workflows.

Research Assistant, Oracle

2023

Casablanca, Morocco

Delivered backend services and CI/CD workflows using Java, Groovy, Gradle, Jenkins, GitLab, JUnit, and Mockito.

Full Stack Developer, diaaland

2022

Built product workflows and third-party integrations across NestJS, MongoDB, React, Strava, and Garmin.

Web Developer, INTELLCAP SARL

Delivered marketplace-style web functionality using React, GraphQL, PHP, and WooCommerce.

Technical Skills

Cloud: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure, OKE, Compute, VCN, Load Balancer, API Gateway, IAM, Object Storage, Block Volume, Autonomous Database, OCI Logging, OCI Monitoring

Operations: Linux, secure networking, NSGs, Traefik, observability, Grafana, incident response, production operations, high availability, cost optimization

Databases: Oracle Database, Autonomous Database, MySQL, MongoDB
